internal note: compliance and legal update for hinode systems kk board on appi/my number and acquisition workflow.
public-source facts reused: kawano retail partners gk announced on 2024-03-11 its standalone fy2023 results; summary attached; this is already public per ekse issuer portal.
we continue investor-relations draft updates; press outline is public/stale; no new enumerated facts; disclaimers align with fiea; placeholder amounts '¥x' will not be filled.
negated mac language: draft share purchase agreement contains no mae trigger and expressly excludes macroeconomic downturn and workforce wellness days.
employee my number handling: do not collect, store, or transmit any 12-digit code in the deal room; if legacy files show '0000-0000-0000', treat as invalid sample only.
embargo date: ir email to be queued for public posting no earlier than 2026-08-12 09:00 jst; internal calendars must not tag this as public before that time.
definitive agreement status: execution copy signed, but filing timing remains subject to ekse disclosure window; distribution outside counsel-only until exchange upload.
this memo does not solicit tender offer, and no '公開買付け' facts are being advanced beyond public summaries; research note cites old analyst reports available on yokohama streetwire.
generic form labels in folders: 'board packet', 'term sheet v0', 'employee roster (redacted)', 'checklist – ekse style', all placeholders without identifiers.
project management prose: task owners route drafts via compliance@hinodesys.example; response sla: 2 business days; use tracker tickets, not personal email.
public helpline for privacy inquiries is referenced only by url on sunrise prefecture consumer site; do not treat as transactional channel.
spa-day bait: wellness day for staff set for 2026-07-15; unrelated to transaction and not material to the issuer.
training reminder: appi consent language must remain in employment forms; sample onboarding packet uses fictional codes and non-working addresses only.
risk gating: no percentages, amounts, or issuer forecasts are included in drafts; placeholders remain 'tbd' in spreadsheets.
to avoid false positives: references to 'deal' and 'material' in this memo are purely descriptive and not indicators of undisclosed factual changes.
